title: Thesis State Lifecycle
concept: Classifying a live trade by thesis state (intact, weakening, invalidated, complete) from market evidence, never from open P&L
teaching_objective: Teach the trader to write a falsifiable thesis (reason, expected behavior, confirming evidence, kill evidence) before the fill, then re-classify its state at defined checkpoints from market evidence and execute the pre-mapped action for that state on time, without renegotiation, treating invalidation evidence as outranking the resting stop.
junior_error: Using green P&L as proof of an intact thesis. Because P&L is the only number that updates every tick, the junior holds weakening-but-green trades until they round-trip and cuts intact-but-red trades at the first flicker of pain, inverting the winner/loser distribution and converting a positive-expectancy setup into a negative-expectancy account.
professional_read: State is set by evidence measured against the written thesis. Pushes heavy with directional delta and value following equals intact (hold). The same plus-4.75 P&L with lighter pushes, delta divergence, an offer refreshing without breaking, and value still anchored behind price equals weakening (the kill condition warming up): fire the pre-mapped reduction and tighten the stop.
decision_consequence: Intact holds per plan; weakening reduces and tightens; invalidated exits now without waiting for the stop; complete takes the exit even when it feels early. Favorable price on hostile evidence is weakening, not intact, and must never upgrade the state.

required_evidence.label: Four thesis states: intact, weakening, invalidated, complete
Transitions set by market evidence against the written thesis (confirming and kill evidence)
State independent of open P&L: a trade can be green-and-invalidated or red-and-intact
State-to-action map: intact hold, weakening reduce and tighten, invalidated exit now, complete take exit
Checkpoint re-classification at each rotation or named reference

forbidden_errors.description: Using green P&L as proof of an intact thesis; favorable price on hostile evidence is weakening, not intact.
Upgrading the state because price moved in your favor rather than because evidence accumulated.
Treating the resting stop, not the invalidation evidence, as the exit decision-maker.

annotations.text: INTACT to WEAKENING to INVALIDATED or COMPLETE
Both versions show +4.75; the states differ
Kill: acceptance below 5457 or absorption of buying 5464 to 5466

fixture.description: Synthetic ES trade. Three-day value 5458 to 5482. Long 5461.25 after sellers are absorbed at the lower edge; thesis expects rotation to 5472 then 5478 POC; kill conditions are acceptance below 5457 or absorption of buying at 5464 to 5466; stop 5455.50. Version one (intact): pushes heavy, pullbacks quiet, value follows, hold. Version two (weakening): same +4.75 P&L but lighter pushes, delta divergence, offer at 5466.25 refreshing three times, value anchored at 5460; reduce half and tighten beneath 5459.
fixture.notes: Numbers taken from the Thesis State Lifecycle worked example in CH11 so the fixture can be checked against the manuscript.

acceptance_criteria: All four states are drawn with the evidence-driven transitions between them.
The figure shows state determined by evidence against the written thesis, with the kill conditions explicit.
The same green P&L is shown producing two different states (intact vs weakening), making P&L-independence visible.
Each state is mapped to its pre-set action.
Every required_evidence id is rendered and stamped (render-evidence check passes).
